scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @worksphere/api & npm run dev -w @worksphere/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w @worksphere/shared && npm run build -w @worksphere/ui && npm run db:generate && npm run build -w @worksphere/database && npm run build -w @worksphere/api && npm run build -w @worksphere/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @worksphere/shared && npm run lint -w @worksphere/ui && npm run lint -w @worksphere/database && npm run lint -w @worksphere/api && npm run lint -w @worksphere/web
